---
title: "ENCoDe LongCat (E1)"
subtitle: "Longitudinal study on face categorization "
description: |
  Data collection is still ongoing.
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![Artwork by \@allison_horst](images/lter_penguins.png)

![](images/culmen_depth.png)
:::

{{< include _load-data.qmd >}}

{{< include _plot-prep.qmd >}}

{{< include _scatter_hist.qmd >}}

<!-- {{< include _scatter.qmd >}} -->

<!-- {{< include _hist.qmd >}} -->
